title: Call of the Crafter
description: Your one stop shop for mods on 1.19.4
body:
[PLEASE NOTE] This pack is in alpha, things will be wrong and stuff wont be right sometimes. Please report any bugs into the Discord link, and as always: BACK UP YOUR WORLD FREQUENTLY WHEN PLAYING MODDED MINECRAFT!

Call of the Crafter is a brand new 1.19.4 compatible modpack built off of the top performance mods to bring the most stable gameplay and easy to learn Vanilla+ mods diamonds can buy!

This pack features over 140+ mods that improve Vanilla Minecraft in a way that will keep you hooked, some of the mods to look forward to are as follows:

[+] AmbientSounds 5

[+] CameraOverhaul

[+] Diggus Maximus

[+] Cinderscapes

[+] YUNG's (all of it)

[+] Mouse Tweaks

[+] Additional Additions

[+] Item Alchemy
